description: Product Description Baby & Toddler Knit Hat with Chin Strap Size Information Small (S): Suggest for 0-6 months age | Head circumference: 14.2 - 16.1 inches; Medium (M): Suggest for 6-12 months | Head circumference: 16.1 - 18.1 inches; Large (L): Suggest for 12-24 months | Head circumference: 18.1 - 19.7 inches. Material: Features a super elastic knit that stretches for a comfortable fit and extended usability. This toddler beanie with earflaps is the perfect gift to keep your baby stylishly warm all season long. Order now for the ultimate winter essential! Baby Winter Hat Details Cute Pompom Top Features a playful, soft pompom on top for a cute and classic look, easy to match any outfit. Fleece Lining Has a cozy fleece lining for extra warmth and softness against the skin. Earflaps Includes built-in ear flaps to provide superior protection and cover for little ears from the wind and cold.
